import { useAuth } from '../hooks/useAuth'; import { SignInForm } from '../components/Auth/SignInForm'; export function Home() { const { user } = useAuth(); return (

Welcome to VSA

{user ? (

Hello, {user.email}!

You are signed in and ready to participate in events.

View Events View Profile
) : (

Please sign in to access events and track your points.

)}
); }
